name: Invoice reminders -- staged dunning with human approval

parameters.content:
## Setup (read me first)

1. Install the tool on THIS n8n host so the `reminders` CLI is on PATH:
   `pip install -e /opt/invoice-reminder` (adjust the path).
2. Create `/opt/invoice-reminder/config.yaml` (set `source.kind` to `csv` or a
   `quickbooks_*` adapter; SMTP creds go in `.env`).
3. Edit the two **Execute Command** nodes if your install path differs.

### Two seatbelts are preserved
- `REMINDERS_ALLOW_SEND=1` is set inline on the Execute Command nodes.
- The **first** seatbelt is the human-approval Wait node below: nothing sends
  until someone opens the resume link. If no one approves, no email goes out.

## Human approval

`Build approval request` puts a summary + the approve link
(`$execution.resumeUrl`) on the item.

**Insert your Slack / Email / Teams node here** and send `approvalMessage`
(or just `approvalUrl`) to whoever approves AR.

Opening the link resumes the run and triggers the REAL send
(`reminders approve`). Nothing was sent before this point.
